author: Sarah E S
content:
Just had brunch (our third visit of a week) and it was delicious. Really fresh, quality ingredients, loads of flavour, just all round outstanding.

The peach iced tea was just what we needed after a hot morning, Husband also recommends the newly created ‘Simon Taco’ - a taco selection that he and another customer also called Simon are pioneering.

You can see why they’re winning all the awards - so deserved, we’d happily pay double for the quality food.
